args.description: Check git status for changes and untracked files

args.content:
# dependencies
/node_modules
/.pnp
.pnp.js

# testing
/coverage

# next.js
/.next/
/out/

# production
/build

# misc
.DS_Store
*.pem

# debug
npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

# local e…

args.command: cd "c:/Users/arthur.nilo/Desktop/me/me" && git log --oneline -5 && echo --- && git show --stat HEAD && echo --- && git status --short
args.description: Check recent commit history and current status
Confirm workflow file has uncommitted changes

args.command:
cd "c:/Users/arthur.nilo/Desktop/me/me" && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Corrige workflow do GitHub Pages para rodar na subpasta deploy-nextjs

EOF
)" && git push
args.description: Commit workflow fix and push to origin

args.command:
cd "c:/Users/arthur.nilo/Desktop/me/me" && git commit --allow-empty -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Trigger fresh Pages deployment run
EOF
)" && git push
args.description: Push empty commit to trigger a fresh workflow run
